title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.1014 - Judicial review
text:
375.1014.  Judicial review. — 1.  A final order issued by the director under sections 375.1000 to 375.1018 is subject to judicial review in accordance with the provisions of chapter 536 in the circuit court of Cole County.
  2.  No order of the director under section 375.942 or order of a court to enforce the same shall in any way relieve or absolve any person affected by such order from any liability under any other laws of this state.
(L. 1991 S.B. 53 § 9, A.L. 2007 S.B. 66)
